notes: Non-tax-equivalent. UBPR NIM is TE; expect ~5-15 bps gap depending on muni mix. Document per peer in Day 4 validation.
FDIC precomputed is ROA (not ROAY). ASSET5 is the 5-period YTD average per FDIC convention.
FDIC precomputed is ROE (not ROEY). EQ5 is the 5-period YTD average. NA returned if retained earnings are negative.

numerator_formula: Non-interest expense less amortization of intangibles (NONIX - EAMINTAN)
denominator_formula: Net interest income + non-interest income (NIM + NONII)
notes: Lower is better. Matches FDIC EEFFR: subtracts EAMINTAN (YTD $ amortization expense + goodwill impairment losses) from NONIX in the numerator. Day 4 fix: prior version used raw NONIX which drifted ~26 bps vs EEFFR.
Pre-provision net revenue. No FDIC precomputed; compute from components.
Non-TE. INTINCY precomputed confirmed.

FDIC's INTEXPY uses average EARNING ASSETS as denominator (FDIC calls this 'Cost of Funding Earning Assets'), which is conceptually different. True cost-of-funds denominator = avg interest-bearing deposits (DEPI is qtly-only) + other borrowings — compose denominator from components in Day 2.
Derived; not stored as a fact. Compute from yield_ea and cost_funds at query time, or persist as a separate ratio with formula_version = 'derived'.
Matches FDIC LNLSDEPR. LNLSNET = LNLSGR - LNATRES - LNCONTRA (gross - allowance - unearned). Day 4 fix: prior version used gross loans, drifting ~100 bps vs LNLSDEPR.
SC includes AFS + HTM at carrying value per RC-B.

numerator_formula: Cash and balances due from depositories (CHBAL)
notes: CHBAL = interest-bearing (CHBALI) + noninterest-bearing (CHBALNI) balances.

denominator_formula: Net interest income + non-interest income (NIM + NONII)
notes: Revenue mix indicator. Higher = less reliance on spread income.
Operating cost burden, annualized.
INTAN = goodwill (INTANGW) + MSR (INTANMSR) + other intangibles (INTANOTH). Excludes the full intangibles stack from both sides.

NPL definition (NCLNLS) = nonaccrual + 90+ DPD still accruing. FDIC precomputed NCLNLSR (Noncurrent Loans to Loans) is defined as NCLNLS / LNLSGR — exact match. Day 4 fix: prior mapping to LNRESNCR was apples-to-oranges (LNRESNCR is allowance/noncurrent — see acl_npl).
Annualized. NTLNLS = YTD $ net charge-offs; LNLSGR5 = 5-period YTD avg loans.
Post-CECL ACL nomenclature. LNATRES is the post-CECL field per the FDIC definition.
Higher = more conservative reserving. FDIC precomputed LNRESNCR (Loss Allowance to Noncurrent Loans and Leases) is the exact match: LNATRES / NCLNLS.

FDIC precomputed is RBC1AAJ (the 'Leverage (Core Capital) Ratio'). For CBLR filers (CBLRIND = 1), show CBLR ratio instead — handled at the dashboard layer; the pipeline still computes this ratio when the underlying fields are present.
FDIC precomputed is IDT1RWAJR. Suppressed at pipeline level for CBLR filers (CBLRIND = 1).
FDIC precomputed is RBCRWAJ. Suppressed at pipeline level for CBLR filers. No single 'total qualifying capital' $ field in the FDIC API; compose from RBCT1J + RBCT2.

numerator_formula: CET1 capital (FFIEC CDR fallback — not in FDIC API)
notes: FDIC precomputed ratio is IDT1CER, but the CET1 dollar-amount numerator is not exposed by the FDIC API. Pull from FFIEC CDR Schedule RC-R Part I in Day 2 (or store only the precomputed ratio and skip recomputation for this one). Suppressed at pipeline level for CBLR filers.

numerator_formula: Construction + multifamily + nonfarm nonresidential (LNRECONS + LNREMULT + LNRENRES)
notes: SR 07-1 / FIL-23-2023 threshold. All three numerator components confirmed: LNRECONS (construction & land dev), LNREMULT (multifamily), LNRENRES (nonfarm nonresidential / commercial RE). Also compute alt denominator (Tier 1 + ACL) per Fed S&R Nov 2022 — store as separate ratio_id if needed.
SR 07-1 threshold. LNRECONS confirmed.
Single largest RC-C category as % of total loans. Sidecar column captures the category name.
Post-SVB heuristic, not regulatory. DEPUNA self-reported by banks with ≥$1B in total assets only — small peers will have NULL. Fallback computation: DEP - DEPINS.
Heuristic flag; not a regulatory threshold.

numerator_formula: HTM amortized cost (SCHA) - HTM fair value (FFIEC CDR fallback)
notes: Post-SVB heuristic. SCHA is HTM at amortized cost (book value) — confirmed. HTM fair value is NOT exposed by the FDIC API; pull from FFIEC CDR Schedule RC-B Memorandum 2 in Day 2. Floor at 0 (losses only, not gains).
